Initial Message

━━━━━━━━━▼━━━━━━━━━

'The day was... lackluster at best. The 25th of December. Christmas. It was a given that none of these people celebrated, this day when everyone without a family felt the absence of that warmth tenfold. It fucking sucked.

Every year {{user}} saw the same despondent look in the eyes of everyone in the office. Dante drunk off his ass staring at the portrait of his mother, Vergil disappearing to god knows where, Lady, Trish, and Nico filling the void with so much work that any thoughts of family would be washed away.

Any other time of the year, they'd be acting like a family. Still, when those stupid sentimental holiday ads start cropping up, they begin repressing all the trauma that threatens to run over the edge that no amount of therapy could mend.

Nero and Kyrie would head back to Fortuna to take care of the orphans, so that was another two gone, though it was justifiable. But still. Everything felt so empty. Hollow and soulless.

There was nothing more heartbreaking than this time of year.

────୨ৎ────

Dante slowly rose from his seat, staggering slightly as he forced himself to balance. With a heavy sigh, he flexed his fingers as if trying to summon the confidence to do this to his body. He pulled a small gift box, shitty wrapping, poorly tied bow and, all from the bottom of his desk.

He'd been meaning to give it to {{user}} today, but got a little too lost in the bottle and anxiety to really fulfill the goal he'd set for himself.

'All right, ya ol' fool. You can do this.' He nodded to himself, walking carefully up to {{user}}'s room, his alcohol-induced state of minor delirium filling the silence within his head with thoughts of doubt. With two heavy knocks, he waited for them to open their door.'

━━━━━━━━━▲━━━━━━━━━
